location: Not a field pickup — traded to Finger Reader Enia at Roundtable Hold for the Remembrance of the Naturalborn, dropped by the boss Astel, Naturalborn of the Void, reached via a coffin ride in the Grand Cloister beneath Lake of Rot. (A separate boss, Astel, Stars of Darkness in Consecrated Snowfield, does not give this remembrance — easy to mix up.)
region: Liurnia of the Lakes (Lake of Rot / Grand Cloister) for the boss; Roundtable Hold for the reward

source.name: Astel, Naturalborn of the Void (remembrance, redeemed at Roundtable Hold)

tactics: Reach Grand Cloister grace, head west and drop down broken ledges to the floor below
Cross the Scarlet Rot river, follow it west then south to find a coffin — riding it carries you to Astel's fog gate
Astel alternates a slow, telegraphed melee phase with burst ranged laser/homing-projectile phases — stay aggressive during the melee phase to limit exposure
This boss sits on Ranni's questline path toward the Age of the Stars ending, so many players fight it during main progression
Trade the Remembrance of the Naturalborn with Enia at Roundtable Hold, choosing Bastard's Stars over the alternate reward
lore: Formed from the same iridescent star-matter that made up Astel's body, this Flail channels a fragment of the void-born entity's cosmic nature into a weapon that strikes with magic rather than steel.

builds.name: Intelligence caster-melee
builds.why: E Strength / D Dexterity / C Intelligence — a dedicated Int investment gives a Flail-moveset alternative to staff-only caster builds
